No significant news intelligence/verification startups with funding found in March 2026 (cycle 57+59 scans confirmed) — window still open for WorldPulse. Global Threat Map launched February 2026 (helpnetsecurity.com) — open-source real-time cyber/threat map, pulls open data feeds to interactive map. Adjacent to WorldPulse but cybersecurity-focused, not news/media intelligence. Low threat.
CollectiveIQ (multi-model AI verification by crowdsourcing) and Sentrial AI (YC W26, agent monitoring) are adjacent but not direct news competitors

Oriane ($2M seed, March 2026): AI video intelligence platform — indexes Instagram/TikTok for visual content searchability + brand monitoring. Adjacent but video-focused, not news/text intelligence. Low threat to WorldPulse.
Yann LeCun's AMI startup ($1.03B seed, March 2026): 'world models' AI research — not a news intelligence competitor, but signals massive AI infrastructure investment continuing.

Cycle 62 scan (March 23): No new news-intelligence/verification startups found with funding. Perplexity passing 1B monthly queries + $300M ARR enterprise — AI search growing but not news intelligence specifically. Ground News feature velocity slowing. Crucix growth plateau. WorldPulse window remains open for developer ecosystem lead.
